summary: Start M7 task rail and collapsed drawers after the decision inspector rewrite closure reached origin/main. This task turns bottom information walls into compact actionable task cards and only expands the currently relevant drawer so the first screen remains readable.

tests_run.result: Started from clean main after PR #210 closure merge.

decisions.decision: Start M7-TASK-RAIL-COLLAPSED-DRAWERS-001 because art/UX feedback requires a compact action rail before content lock can be reconsidered.
Do not treat this UX repair as formal M7 content-lock approval.

risks.summary: Collapsed cards can hide important state if severity, reason, and action copy are not explicit enough.
risks.mitigation: Each card must show one problem, one reason, one action, and severity/urgency through text plus visual treatment; QA must check 1280x720 and 1440x900.

requested_action: Implement the bounded task rail/collapsed drawer rewrite and return a validated writer handoff for independent QA review.
